subject_description: Semantic search over the internal knowledge base, launched last quarter.

layers.evidence_summary: Task success rate tracked weekly via a labeled eval set, reviewed in sprint retro.
Override rate surfaced once during a support ticket review, not logged systematically.
No business metric has been defined for this feature since launch.

verdicts.name: Business-Outcome Orphaned
verdicts.message: The AI feature has no defined link to a business metric at all. This is the single most common and most expensive gap seen in practice — a feature can be well-built and well-used and still get cut in a budget review because nobody can point to what it moved.

verdicts.name: Trust Failure Signal
verdicts.message: The model measures well internally, but users are overriding it faster than the threshold that historically predicts abandonment. This is a leading indicator, not a lagging one — it shows up here before it shows up as churn.
